max_runtime: Hobby: 45 min; Pro/Enterprise: 24 h (default timeout 5 min, extendable via sandbox.extendTimeout())
name: Vercel Sandbox
notes: Vercel's docs describe Snapshots and Persistent sandboxes that auto-save filesystem and installed packages, but do not explicitly state that in-memory process state survives stop and resume.
pricing_model: Metered by Active CPU (per vCPU-hour) and Provisioned Memory (per GB-hour); also charges for Sandbox Creations, Snapshot storage, and Data transfer
summary: Vercel Sandbox provides on-demand, isolated Linux microVMs for safely running untrusted or user-generated code. It is primarily used by developers building AI agents and interactive tools that require a secure, ephemeral compute environment.
